requirements.label: Referral code/link are correct
requirements.next: Keep every post using code 26BC4B90CB and the worldcup26.world referral link.

requirements.label: Live platform/ad landing URLs are working
requirements.next: Fix live ad QA before sending traffic if this ever turns red.

requirements.label: Meta/X ad click and preview paths are working
requirements.next: Fix ad-platform audit before trusting Meta/X previews or paid clicks.

requirements.label: Paid click conversion flow is ready
requirements.next: Fix the conversion guard before scaling paid traffic if this ever turns red.

requirements.label: Video/design assets are available to workers
requirements.next: Keep using the main MP4, QR story/square assets, and phone action center.

requirements.label: Dexter/Sienna/Memo/Nano have current actions
requirements.next: Wake the worker shown in the board and execute the real action before logging proof.

requirements.label: Four droplets have campaign tooling awake
requirements.next: Run the remote war-room and repair any infrastructure host failure before relying on the campaign loop.

requirements.label: Nonstop 72h campaign loop/watchdog is running
requirements.next: Restart campaign-loop/watchdog on any host that drops out.

requirements.label: Reply/conversion response kit is ready
requirements.next: Use the response kit after a real person replies, then log the reply proof only after it happened.

requirements.label: First human action gate is explicit
requirements.next: Send the first real tester or warm-contact batch, then run the logger with the real count/account.

requirements.label: Real external posting proof is current
requirements.next: Do the next real action and log proof with a public URL or precise private-channel note.

requirements.label: Public channel blockers are tracked
requirements.next: Use a logged-in owned public account or complete the login manually, then log the public URL.

primary.action: Send three clean referral signup tests
primary.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Memo" --platform "WhatsApp testers" --channel "clean signup test batch" --status "sent" --attempt-url "https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-testers&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=clean_signup_test" --detail "Sent clean signup test to <N> trusted testers from <account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asked each to accept invite, Google signup, pick 3 teams, and reply with success or blocking screenshot; code 26BC4B90CB included" --next-action "run campaign-signup-conversion-audit.mjs after tester replies or after 15 minutes"

blocker.nextAction: Owner must log into X or use an already logged-in owned X session, then publish a public fallback post and log the public status URL.

truth: This objective audit is a completion guard. It proves readiness where evidence exists and keeps the full marketing objective incomplete until real external posting proof exists.
